features.name: home-layout
features.description: Pure 3-tier grouping of the home destinations (hero · primary grid · المزيد disclosure) — Front A UX hierarchy

features.name: refusal
features.description: «ما لا يفعله عهد» — the three refusals (no lending/scoring/judging) made visible as block-and-explain cards + the charity hero, each citing its guard file (Front B)

features.name: hash-diff
features.description: Pure hex-nibble divergence for the judge-driven tamper — highlights which seal characters moved (Front C)

features.name: impact-national
features.description: National compression scenario — applies Ahd's measured netting ratio to the cited execution-court load (EVIDENCE-BRIEF D-1), illustrative + integer, rendered on the settle screen (Front D)

features.name: impact-band
features.description: National compression SENSITIVITY BAND (data-rigor fix D1) — deterministic p10/p50/p90 over 200 seeded synthetic circles (golden netting reused via DI), replacing impact-national's single-point projection with a range on the settle screen; the old point is kept only as a labelled reference inside the band

features.name: sources
features.description: «المصادر والمنهجيّة» — checked-in dataset naming every external/aggregate figure a judge can see, each tagged measured (real, cited, with a year) or illustrative (labelled scenario); rendered as an expandable section on the impact screen (W3, data criterion)

features.name: create
features.description: Create-عهد flow with riba linter

features.name: riba-lint
features.description: Deepened riba linter (additive over golden)

features.name: settlement
features.description: Muqassa netting + conservation proof

features.name: impact
features.description: «أثر عهد» impact analytics — k-anonymous netting-efficiency aggregates over labeled test circles + the 9→2 collapse visual (JL-3)

features.name: daftari
features.description: Creditor home ledger + hub

features.name: open-loan
features.description: Open-term qard hasan

features.name: circle
features.description: Circle treasurer dashboard + group reminder

features.name: circle-adv
features.description: Advanced circle (splits, recurring, graduation)

features.name: timeline
features.description: Witness timeline (سِجلّ الشهادة)

features.name: proof
features.description: Proof-pack / evidence export

features.name: dispute
features.description: Dispute pause (محلّ خلاف)

features.name: request
features.description: Borrower-initiated request (اطلب عهدًا)

features.name: settings
features.description: Settings + privacy + digit toggle

features.name: borrower
features.description: Borrower home «ما عليّ» + borrower-invokable grace/pay (2:280)

features.name: covenant-log
features.description: Sealed good-faith / mercy trail «سِجلّ المعروف» (neutral court exhibit)

features.name: standing-loan
features.description: Standing/recurring two-party qard hasan «سُلفة بالمعروف» (Musaned wedge)

features.name: bounds
features.description: «الضمانات والحدود» guarantees-as-code panel — للمدين · للدائن · حدود المصرف, every guarantee names the real test/rule enforcing it (JL-4)

features.name: home
features.description: Home front door

features.name: shariah-basis
features.description: «الأساس الشرعي» (feasibility gate, W4) — every core mechanic cited to its verse/AAOIFI standard/law, honestly graded; every open Shariah question (Hilah, D-1, D-3, multilateral netting) phrased as a question for a scholar, never a ruling

features.name: impact-drill
features.description: Per-circle drill-down under an «أثر عهد» size-bucket (k-floor enforced structurally)

features.name: exhibit-view
features.description: Arabic line projection of the neutral court exhibit (CovenantLog.exhibitFor) rendered on-screen

features.name: bounds-detail
features.description: Parse each guarantee's «يحرسه» line into guard files + run command for the bounds disclosures

features.name: settle-presets
features.description: Alternative demo tangles for «المقاصّة» over the golden five — judge-pokeable netting

features.name: billing
features.description: «الأجرة والخطط» pluggable flat-fee engine + plans/paywall screen — spine-clean revenue surfaces (flat, never % of loan; D-6 shariah-review flagged) (Phase A)

features.name: fee-receipt
features.description: «إيصال أجرة التوثيق» — the two-line, never-summed seal receipt (الزيادة على القرض: 0.00 · أجرة ثابتة: 5.00), the judge-legible proof the money story is spine-clean (Phase A)

features.name: org
features.description: «لوحة المؤسسة» institution/waqf admin dashboard — aggregate KPIs + flat SaaS invoice (from Billing), the surface the first paying customer logs into; aggregates only, k-anon, no pooled custody (Phase B)
